title: Mebahel's Creatures - Baby Creeper
description: This mod introduces a deceptively cute version of the iconic explosive mob — smaller, faster, and just as deadly. These tiny terrors have a lower blast radius, random chance to replace regular creepers, and can be fully customized via config.
body:
## 🐺 Partnered with Godlike Host!

I'm proudly partnered with **[Godlike Host](https://godlike.host/minecraft-java-servers-hosting/?aff_id=1302)** — a high-performance game server provider perfect for **Minecraft Java**. 👉 Click the logo above to explore their hosting plans. By using this link, **you support my modding work directly!** *** # 💣 Mebahel’s Creatures: Baby Creeper _"Small size, big boom."_ **Baby Creeper** is a mob variant that spawns in place of regular Creepers. It’s **smaller**, **faster**, has **less explosive power**, but is **just as dangerous**. These little creepers add chaos, surprise, and charm to your Minecraft world — and are fully configurable! *** ## 📦 Required Dependencies This mod requires the following on **Fabric or Quilt**: * [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) If you use Forge or Neoforge via Sinytra, also install: * [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/sinytra-connector) * [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/ffapi) *** ## ⚔️ Features * 👶 **Baby Creepers** spawn naturally (chance-based) or from spawners (customizable) * 💥 **Reduced explosion radius** (customizable) * 🏃‍♂️ **Faster movement speed** than regular Creepers (customizable) * 🎨 Compatible with **resource packs** (uses standard creeper texture) *** ## ⚙️ Configurable Settings You can tweak the Baby Creeper behavior using the config file located at: > `config/mebahels-creatures-baby-creeper/mebahels_creatures_baby_creeper_config.json` ``` { "babyCreeperSpawnChance": 5, "babyCreeperSpeedMultiplier": 1.15, "babyCreeperExplosionRadius": 2.0 } ``` *** ## 💬 Notes & Credits * 🧪 This mod is **a work in progress** — feedback and ideas are welcome! * 💬 Join our Discord: [https://discord.com/invite/y8uC2NepkB](https://discord.com/invite/y8uC2NepkB) *** ## 🔎 Discover More Mods by Mebahel [![Mebahel's Antique Beasts](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1071/689/64/64/638607287891334052.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mebahels-antique-beasts) ⚔️ **Mebahel's Antique Beasts** Add epic mythological creatures, weapons, and lore to your Minecraft world. [![Zombie Horde](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1067/539/64/64/638601866522157802.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mebahels-zombie-horde) 🧟 **Mebahel’s Zombie Horde** Face smarter, faster, and more organized zombies that swarm you at night.
